mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_application (user_id, requested_amount, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{requestedAmount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.requested_amount, a.status, a.create_time, p.real_name, p.id_card, u.username FROM credit_application a LEFT JOIN user_profile p ON a.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 0 ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
